name: Beijing Beetech Inc.
summary: Beijing Beetech Inc. develops, produces, and sells wireless sensor network related products in China. It offers industrial process wireless monitoring system solutions for use in the areas of smart industry, digital oil fields, smart grids, etc.; mechanical parameters wireless detection systems for use in the areas of equipment manufacturing, research and testing, teaching and experimentation, and defense research; and MEMS pressure sensor chip and module products for use in automotive and consumer electronics. The company is based in Beijing, China.
